causal_interpretation: This boundary tests whether repair failure is merely over-aggressive amplitude. Only leave-one-segment-out calibration performance may select the next row.
hypothesis: Cross-validated shrinkage can prevent high-energy outliers from dominating repair.
next_run_rationale: Test exactly the selected installed payload and shrinkage on untouched contexts.
